title: Ooocraft
description: Discover the magic Land of Ooo in Minecraft!
body:
![Ooocraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0547dd42074b7cdaedd3eea75dae79eb0b13c10a.png)

Ooocraft adds many crazy things from the Land of Ooo such as weapons, mobs, food and much more into Minecraft! This mod is in its early development stages and new features are added to the mod every few months. Keep in mind that a few features can't be obtained in survival yet. Please note that the [Geckolib mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) is required for you to be able to use this mod!
